overview: This deck leverages land drops and mana acceleration to rapidly deploy Omnath, Locus of Creation, generating massive card advantage and mana advantage. Solitude and Teferi, Time Raveler provide board control and tempo while the engine ramps into an insurmountable resource lead. The goal is to outvalue opponents through relentless land plays and protective permanents.
win_conditions: Outvalue opponents with Omnath's land-drop counters and mana generation
Stall the board with Solitude and Teferi, Time Raveler until resources are exhausted
Deploy a wide board of lands and creatures to overwhelm defenses

keep_criteria: Hands with 2+ lands and a cheap spell or creature
Hands containing Omnath, Locus of Creation with early land drops
Hands with Solitude or Teferi, Time Raveler and sufficient mana
mulligan_criteria: Hands with only high-cost permanents and no acceleration
Hands lacking interaction or early plays

early_game: Prioritize land drops and cheap mana rocks to accelerate into Omnath
Play Solitude early to disrupt opponent's board development
Use Teferi, Time Raveler to protect key permanents and gain tempo
mid_game: Focus on playing lands to trigger Omnath's counters and generate mana
Use generated mana to cast additional threats or answer opponent's plays
Maintain board presence with Solitude and Teferi while ramping
late_game: Leverage massive mana advantage to deploy multiple threats simultaneously
Use Omnath's counters to draw cards or generate additional resources
Close out the game with an unblockable board state or direct damage

key_cards.name: Omnath, Locus of Creation
key_cards.role: Core engine that generates mana and counters when lands are played
key_cards.notes: Prioritize playing lands to maximize its triggers; use counters to draw cards or generate additional mana

key_cards.name: Solitude
key_cards.notes: Play early to prevent opponent from developing their board; use its ability to bounce threats or protect your permanents

key_cards.name: Teferi, Time Raveler
key_cards.notes: Use to bounce opponent's threats, protect Omnath, or draw cards; keep it on the battlefield as long as possible

sequencing_tips: Always play lands before other spells to trigger Omnath's abilities
Hold up mana for Solitude's ability to bounce key threats
Use Teferi, Time Raveler's abilities to respond to opponent's plays rather than proactively
Prioritize keeping Solitude and Teferi on the battlefield to maintain tempo

matchups.advice: Play Solitude early to disrupt their board and buy time for Omnath to come online
watch_for: Board wipes that clear your Solitude

matchups.advice: Ramp quickly to outvalue them and use Teferi to protect your permanents from their removal
Balance land drops with threats to pressure their board while ramping into Omnath
